'''Garia''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Garia system/Legends|Garia system]] of the [[Brak sector/Legends|Brak sector]]. It was the site of a [[Battle of Garia|battle]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="PB" />

{{Planet-stub}}
